blocker: Cannot actually submit: needs compiled PDF + main.bbl (no LaTeX toolchain/official aaai2026.sty in env) and an authenticated arXiv account + possible endorsement; packager auto-detects NO_BBL and ANON_AUTHOR. Task forbids submitting.
one_line: Built arXiv submission-readiness package for SRE-Degrees: metadata (cs.SE primary; cs.AI/cs.LG cross-list; 1215-char macro-free abstract), gated submission checklist, and a stdlib deterministic package_arxiv.py that bundles the real F6 LaTeX source into an AutoTeX-ready tarball+manifest; 6/6 pytest pass; packager correctly flags NO_BBL+ANON_AUTHOR (advisory exit 1).
